asset_spec.rework_note: Second rework after Ethan screenshot: rebuilt from the accepted opaque lamp-base body and replaced the shade-opening warm and white bulb pixels with a matte liner clipped to the original opening. The blue shade shell remains solid; no full bulb outline remains readable through or inside the shade.

off.shade_policy: opaque blue shade shell preserved; full bulb silhouette and white bulb circle painted out; only matte warm liner clipped to the shade opening plus emitted light/cone/button glow remains

turning-on.shade_policy: opaque blue shade shell preserved; full bulb silhouette and white bulb circle painted out; only matte warm liner clipped to the shade opening plus emitted light/cone/button glow remains

on.shade_policy: opaque blue shade shell preserved; full bulb silhouette and white bulb circle painted out; only matte warm liner clipped to the shade opening plus emitted light/cone/button glow remains

turning-off.shade_policy: opaque blue shade shell preserved; full bulb silhouette and white bulb circle painted out; only matte warm liner clipped to the shade opening plus emitted light/cone/button glow remains

scope_note: WTJ-20260704-069 Designer 2 pass: addresses Ethan screenshot that the bulb was visible through the shade / shade transparency got worse by rebuilding actual source frames so no bulb outline remains readable through the shade.

generation_method.mode: deterministic derived bitmap frames from accepted production sprite
generation_method.reason: Regenerating the lamp body would risk material drift; the accepted static sprite is retained while all white bulb pixels inside the shade opening are replaced with a matte opaque liner and emitted light layers.
generation_method.prompt_reference: WorkTime Justin v3 production sprite style: polished 2.5D soft-plastic / soft-clay children app illustration. Preserve the blue lamp body and gold arm exactly. Make the shade an opaque blue solid shell; do not show a bulb silhouette through the shade or as a visible circle in the opening. Replace bulb pixels with a matte warm inner liner clipped to the original shade opening; show lamp-on through warm liner glow, emitted cone, and button glow; no transparent shell, no strange perspective, no watermark, no background, no magenta residue.
generation_method.ethan_rejection_addressed: bulb visible through shade / shade transparency got worse

validation_summary: All 13 production frames are 1024x1024 RGBA with transparent corners. Turning-on endpoints match off/on and turning-off endpoints match on/off. Manifest paths, sheets, contact sheet, docs, and GIF preview are present. Actual frames remove the previous yellow translucent side cue and cover the white bulb circle with a matte warm liner clipped to the original shade opening.
